message:
fix: schema migration order + add embedding rate to progress bar

- Fix v3→v4 migration: run migrate_v4_add_model_id() BEFORE create_schema()
  so model_id column exists when idx_embeddings_model index is created
- Add docs/sec rate display to embedding progress bar
- Show average docs/sec in embedding summary output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
